0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Plugin System"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Extensible plugin architecture for custom memory behavior."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Creating a Plugin"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne.core.plugins import MnemosynePlugin\n\nclass AuditPlugin(MnemosynePlugin):\n  name = \"audit-logger\"\n  \n  def on_remember(self, memory):\n      print(f\"[AUDIT] Stored: {memory.id}\")\n  \n  def on_recall(self, memory):\n      print(f\"[AUDIT] Recalled: {memory.get('id')}\")\n  \n  def on_consolidate(self, summary):\n      print(f\"[AUDIT] Consolidated: {summary.get('memory_count', 0)}\")\n  \n  def on_invalidate(self, memory_id):\n      print(f\"[AUDIT] Invalidated: {memory_id}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Registering"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"mem = Mnemosyne()\n\nmem.plugins.register_plugin(\"audit-logger\", AuditPlugin)\nmem.plugins.discover_plugins()\nplugins = mem.plugins.list_plugins()\nmem.plugins.unload_plugin(\"audit-logger\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Built-in Plugins"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Plugin"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"LoggingPlugin"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Logs all operations"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"MetricsPlugin"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Tracks counts and latencies"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"FilterPlugin"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Filters by custom criteria"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Auto-Discovery"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Drop Python files into ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/plugins/"}],". Any ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MnemosynePlugin"}]," subclass is auto-loaded."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Related"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","a",null,{"href":"/architecture/streaming","children":"Architecture: Streaming"}]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","a",null,{"href":"/architecture/pattern-detection","children":"Architecture: Pattern Detection"}]}],"\n"]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/09vsub61~3cmu.js","async":true}]],["$","$L4",null,{"children":["$","$5",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@6"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"Sb8Pv6LF3kvebTSlufmqO"}
